goal: Login with 'standard_user'/'secret_sauce'. 1) Sort items by 'Price (low to high)'. 2) Add the cheapest AND the most expensive item to the cart. 3) Go to cart, verify 2 items exist. 4) Checkout (Zip: 90210) and verify the 'Item total' equals the sum of the two products exactly.

scenarios.name: Add cheapest and most expensive items to cart and verify total
scenarios.description: Login, sort items by price, add cheapest and most expensive items to cart, verify cart contents and total.

args.description: Name (A to Z) Name (Z to A) Price (low to high) Price (high to low)
